body.title: pe: Seed HYPOTHESIZE node — tier.2 emits structured edit JSON
body.result: HYPOTHESIZE step added: tier.2 Ollama call with structured edit JSON prompt. _parse_hypothesis (JSON+regex fallback), _validate_hypothesis (old_string must exist verbatim). Validation failure sets hypothesis_error but does NOT block chain. 61 tests.
body.description: Tier.2 call: given basket[ticket_description] + basket[actual], emit basket[hypothesis] = {file, old_string, new_string}. Single edit per call (expand to list later). Uses L3 HYPOTHESIZE template. Tests: hypothesis is valid structured edit for a sample input.
